title: [FIRRTL] getWidthlessType drops const on width-carrying ground types
body:
Surprisingly getWidthlessType appears to drop const off of the ground types that have widths.

This seems wrong and isn't documented, but the trivial fix here breaks a test due to an operation failing type inference.

What's going on here, can you take a look @trilorez ?

Failure:

```
FAIL: CIRCT :: Dialect/FIRRTL/SFCTests/constant-data-taps.fir (1 of 576)
******************** TEST 'CIRCT :: Dialect/FIRRTL/SFCTests/constant-data-taps.fir' FAILED ********************
Script:
--
: 'RUN: at line 1';   /home/will/src/sifive/circt/build/bin/firtool --verilog /home/will/src/sifive/circt/test/Dialect/FIRRTL/SFCTests/constant-data-taps.fir | /home/will/src/sifive/circt/llvm/build/bin/FileCheck /home/will/src/sifive/circt/test/Dialect/FIRRTL/SFCTests/constant-data-taps.fir
--
Exit Code: 2

Command Output (stderr):
--
/home/will/src/sifive/circt/test/Dialect/FIRRTL/SFCTests/constant-data-taps.fir:19:10: error: 'firrtl.asUInt' op inferred type(s) '!firrtl.const.uint<1>' are incompatible with return type(s) of operation '!firrtl.uint<1>'
  module ConstantSinking:
         ^
/home/will/src/sifive/circt/test/Dialect/FIRRTL/SFCTests/constant-data-taps.fir:19:10: error: 'firrtl.asUInt' op failed to infer returned types
  module ConstantSinking:
         ^
/home/will/src/sifive/circt/test/Dialect/FIRRTL/SFCTests/constant-data-taps.fir:19:10: note: see current operation: %5 = "firrtl.asUInt"(%4) : (!firrtl.const.uint<1>) -> !firrtl.uint<1>
FileCheck error: '<stdin>' is empty.
FileCheck command line:  /home/will/src/sifive/circt/llvm/build/bin/FileCheck /home/will/src/sifive/circt/test/Dialect/FIRRTL/SFCTests/constant-data-taps.fir
```

When running with the expected simple fix for this: #5326.
